---
name: Skill Request
about: Request a new ethical hacking skill and lab environment
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Request

**Skill name (kebab-case):**
<!-- e.g., detecting-command-injection-vulnerabilities -->

**Category / Subdomain:**
<!-- web-application-testing, network-reconnaissance, privilege-escalation, etc. -->

**Difficulty:**
<!-- beginner / intermediate / advanced -->

**MITRE ATT&CK technique(s):**
<!-- e.g., T1190, T1548.001 -->

**What gap does this fill?**
<!-- What can't students currently learn from the existing skills? -->

**Should include a Docker lab environment?**
<!-- Yes / No — if yes, describe the vulnerable target needed -->

**Safety considerations:**
<!-- How will this skill/lab ensure it can't be misused against unauthorized systems? -->

**Are you willing to contribute this skill yourself?**
<!-- Yes / No / Maybe — see CONTRIBUTING.md -->

---
> ⚠️ All skills must be safe, educational, and legal. Requests for skills that enable attacks on unauthorized systems will be closed.
